title: pilosella suprafloccosa
intro: Pilosella suprafloccosa, a member of the Asteraceae family, is a flowering plant also known as yellow salsify or meadow salsify. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Pilosella suprafloccosa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
